languages.text: "Дары Омниссии имеют свою цену, которую не каждый способен уплатить. Их машинные духи могут гневаться и отторгать плоть, с которой их сопрягли, вызывая боль или даже... неописуемую агонию. Иногда единственный способ ее прекратить — извлечь аугмент, что зачастую может нести риск летального исхода. Моя цель — найти способ его нивелировать".

"The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."
languages.original_text: "Дары Омниссии имеют свою цену, которую не каждый способен уплатить. Их машинные духи могут гневаться и отторгать плоть, с которой их сопрягли, вызывая боль или даже... неописуемую агонию. Иногда единственный способ ее прекратить — извлечь аугмент, что зачастую может нести риск летального исхода. Моя цель — найти способ его нивелировать".

Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

languages.text: “欧姆尼赛亚的恩赐往往伴随着代价，并非所有人都能承受。它们的机魂可能会暴走，排斥与其融合的血肉，带来痛苦，甚至……难以言喻的折磨。有时，唯一的解脱方式就是将植入物剥离，而这往往伴随着死亡的风险。我的目标，正是寻求缓解这种情况的方法。”
languages.original_text: "The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

traits.locale_text: “欧姆尼赛亚的恩赐往往伴随着代价，并非所有人都能承受。它们的机魂可能会暴走，排斥与其融合的血肉，带来痛苦，甚至……难以言喻的折磨。有时，唯一的解脱方式就是将植入物剥离，而这往往伴随着死亡的风险。我的目标，正是寻求缓解这种情况的方法。”

languages.text: « Les dons de l'Omnimessie ont un coût que tout le monde n'est pas en mesure de payer. Leur esprit de la machine peut se mettre en colère et rejeter la chair à laquelle il est lié, provoquant des douleurs ou même... une agonie indescriptible. Parfois, le seul moyen d'y mettre fin est d'extraire l'augmentation, souvent au risque de tuer le sujet. Je cherche un moyen de réduire ce risque. »
languages.original_text: "The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

traits.locale_text: « Les dons de l'Omnimessie ont un coût que tout le monde n'est pas en mesure de payer. Leur esprit de la machine peut se mettre en colère et rejeter la chair à laquelle il est lié, provoquant des douleurs ou même... une agonie indescriptible. Parfois, le seul moyen d'y mettre fin est d'extraire l'augmentation, souvent au risque de tuer le sujet. Je cherche un moyen de réduire ce risque. »

languages.text: «Los dones del Omnissiah exigen un precio y no todos están en posición de pagarlo. Los espíritus máquina pueden enfurecerse y rechazar la carne a la que están unidos, causando dolor e incluso una agonía indescriptible. A veces, la única solución es extraer el aumento, lo que conlleva el peligro de muerte. Mi objetivo es mitigar ese peligro».
languages.original_text: "The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

traits.locale_text: «Los dones del Omnissiah exigen un precio y no todos están en posición de pagarlo. Los espíritus máquina pueden enfurecerse y rechazar la carne a la que están unidos, causando dolor e incluso una agonía indescriptible. A veces, la única solución es extraer el aumento, lo que conlleva el peligro de muerte. Mi objetivo es mitigar ese peligro».

languages.text: "Hermesih'in lütuflarının herkesin ödeyemeyeceği bir bedeli vardır. Makine ruhları öfkelenebilir ve birleştikleri eti reddederek acıya ve hatta... Tarif edilemez ızdıraplara neden olabilirler. Bazen bunu bitirmenin tek yolu, ogmenti çıkarmaktır. Bu da genellikle ölüm riski taşır. Benim amacım, bunu hafifletmenin bir yolunu bulmak."
languages.original_text: "The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in lütuflarının herkesin ödeyemeyeceği bir bedeli vardır. Makine ruhları öfkelenebilir ve birleştikleri eti reddederek acıya ve hatta... Tarif edilemez ızdıraplara neden olabilirler. Bazen bunu bitirmenin tek yolu, ogmenti çıkarmaktır. Bu da genellikle ölüm riski taşır. Benim amacım, bunu hafifletmenin bir yolunu bulmak."

languages.text: "Die Gaben des Omnissiah haben einen Preis, den nicht jeder zu bezahlen bereit ist. Ihre Maschinengeister können in Wut geraten und das Fleisch abstoßen, mit dem sie verbunden wurden, was zu Schmerzen oder ... unbeschreiblicher Agonie führt. Mitunter ist die einzige Lösung die Entfernung der Augmentation, was häufig zum Tod ihres Trägers führt. Ich möchte einen Weg finden, dies zu lindern."
languages.original_text: "The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

traits.locale_text: "Die Gaben des Omnissiah haben einen Preis, den nicht jeder zu bezahlen bereit ist. Ihre Maschinengeister können in Wut geraten und das Fleisch abstoßen, mit dem sie verbunden wurden, was zu Schmerzen oder ... unbeschreiblicher Agonie führt. Mitunter ist die einzige Lösung die Entfernung der Augmentation, was häufig zum Tod ihres Trägers führt. Ich möchte einen Weg finden, dies zu lindern."

languages.text: 「オムニッシアの賜物には代償が伴い、それは誰もが支払えるものではありません。その機械精霊は荒れ狂い、接合された肉体を拒絶し、痛みを、いや、言葉にできぬほどの……苦悶さえも引き起こすことがあります。時に、それを終わらせる唯一の方法は、オーグメティックを摘出することですが、それはしばしば死の危険を伴います。私の目的は、これを緩和する方法を見出すことなのです」
languages.original_text: "The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."

traits.locale_text: 「オムニッシアの賜物には代償が伴い、それは誰もが支払えるものではありません。その機械精霊は荒れ狂い、接合された肉体を拒絶し、痛みを、いや、言葉にできぬほどの……苦悶さえも引き起こすことがあります。時に、それを終わらせる唯一の方法は、オーグメティックを摘出することですが、それはしばしば死の危険を伴います。私の目的は、これを緩和する方法を見出すことなのです」
